trans-unit.source: Non-Spatial Queries
trans-unit.target: Non-Spatial Queries

trans-unit.source: __🔙[Back to Homepage](/content/intro.md)__
trans-unit.target: __🔙[Back to Homepage](/content/intro.md)__

trans-unit.source: Manual selection
trans-unit.target: Manual selection

trans-unit.source: Select the features manually in the __attribute table__ by clicking on it.
trans-unit.target: Select the features manually in the __attribute table__ by clicking on it.

trans-unit.source: Holding <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> while selecting features lets you select multiple features at once.
trans-unit.target: Holding <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> while selecting features lets you select multiple features at once.

trans-unit.source:
:::{dropdown} Example: Manually select countries with the attribute table :open:
:::
trans-unit.target:
:::{dropdown} Example: Manually select countries with the attribute table :open:
:::

trans-unit.source: Select by expression
trans-unit.target: Select by expression

trans-unit.source: The `Select by Expression` tool lets you build an expression to select features of a layer. For example, you can select specific attributes, or select features where the value of an attribute in a specific range.
trans-unit.target: The `Select by Expression` tool lets you build an expression to select features of a layer. For example, you can select specific attributes, or select features where the value of an attribute in a specific range.

trans-unit.source: Open the attribute table and select the `Select by Expression`-tool.
trans-unit.target: Open the attribute table and select the `Select by Expression`-tool.

trans-unit.source: The expression builder will open.
trans-unit.target: The expression builder will open.

trans-unit.source: Comparison operators
trans-unit.target: Comparison operators

trans-unit.source:
:::{dropdown} Example: Select all cities with more than 20 million inhabitants in 2015: `"2015" > 20000` :open:
:::
trans-unit.target:
:::{dropdown} Example: Select all cities with more than 20 million inhabitants in 2015: `"2015" > 20000` :open:
:::

trans-unit.source: Special operators
trans-unit.target: Special operators

trans-unit.source:
:::{dropdown} Example: Select all countries in Asia: `"continent" LIKE 'asia'` :open:
:::
trans-unit.target:
:::{dropdown} Example: Select all countries in Asia: `"continent" LIKE 'asia'` :open:
:::

trans-unit.source: Logical operators
trans-unit.target: Logical operators

trans-unit.source: `AND`, `OR`
trans-unit.target: `AND`, `OR`

trans-unit.source: Can be used to combine different queries or criteria.
trans-unit.target: Can be used to combine different queries or criteria.

trans-unit.source:
:::{dropdown} Example: Cities, not having a population of one million inhabitants in 1950, had surged to over 10 million inhabitants by 2015: `"1950" < 1000 AND "2015" > 10000` :open:
:::
trans-unit.target:
:::{dropdown} Example: Cities, not having a population of one million inhabitants in 1950, had surged to over 10 million inhabitants by 2015: `"1950" < 1000 AND "2015" > 10000` :open:
:::

trans-unit.source: Complex Expressions
trans-unit.target: Complex Expressions

trans-unit.source: It is also possible to add expressions that chain different requirements. In this case do not forget to put brackets around individual parts of the expression such as:
trans-unit.target: It is also possible to add expressions that chain different requirements. In this case do not forget to put brackets around individual parts of the expression such as:

trans-unit.source: Save selected features as a new file
trans-unit.target: Save selected features as a new file

trans-unit.source: `Layer-Properties` → `Export` → `Save only selected features`.
trans-unit.target: `Layer-Properties` → `Export` → `Save only selected features`.

trans-unit.source:
:::{dropdown} Example: Export selected features as a new file :open:
:::
trans-unit.target:
:::{dropdown} Example: Export selected features as a new file :open:
:::

trans-unit.source: Select by expression options
trans-unit.target: Select by expression options

trans-unit.source: :::{tab-item} Arithmetic operators | operator | functionality | |----------|------------------------| | __`+`__ | addition | | __`-`__ | subtraction | | __`*`__ | multiplication | | __`/`__ | division | | __`%`__ | remainder of division | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{tab-item} Arithmetic operators | operator | functionality | |----------|------------------------| | __`+`__ | addition | | __`-`__ | subtraction | | __`*`__ | multiplication | | __`/`__ | division | | __`%`__ | remainder of division | :::

trans-unit.source: :::{tab-item} Comparison operators | operator | functionality | |----------|--------------------------| | __`=`__ | equals | | __`!=`__ | not equal | | __`<`__ | less than | | __`>`__ | greater than | | __`<=`__ | less than or equal to | | __`>=`__ | greater than or equal to | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{tab-item} Comparison operators | operator | functionality | |----------|--------------------------| | __`=`__ | equals | | __`!=`__ | not equal | | __`<`__ | less than | | __`>`__ | greater than | | __`<=`__ | less than or equal to | | __`>=`__ | greater than or equal to | :::

trans-unit.source: :::{tab-item} Logical operators Operators such as AND, OR can be used to combine different queries or criteria | operator | functionality | |----------|------------------------| | __`AND`__ | logical AND | | __`OR`__ | logical OR | | __`NOT`__ | logical NOT | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{tab-item} Logical operators Operators such as AND, OR can be used to combine different queries or criteria | operator | functionality | |----------|------------------------| | __`AND`__ | logical AND | | __`OR`__ | logical OR | | __`NOT`__ | logical NOT | :::

trans-unit.source: :::{tab-item} Special operators | operator | functionality | |---------------|------------------------------------------------| | __`LIKE`__ | pattern matching | | __`IN`__ | checks if a value is in a list of values | | __`IS NULL`__ | checks for null values | | __`BETWEEN`__ | checks if a value is within a specified range | | __`CASE WHEN`__ | conditional expressions | :::
trans-unit.target: :::{tab-item} Special operators | operator | functionality | |---------------|------------------------------------------------| | __`LIKE`__ | pattern matching | | __`IN`__ | checks if a value is in a list of values | | __`IS NULL`__ | checks for null values | | __`BETWEEN`__ | checks if a value is within a specified range | | __`CASE WHEN`__ | conditional expressions | :::

trans-unit.source: Further resources
trans-unit.target: Further resources

trans-unit.source: You can access information about logical operators in QGIS documentation through the [following link](https://docs.qgis.org/3.28/en/docs/user_manual/working_with_vector/attribute_table.html#selecting-features).
trans-unit.target: You can access information about logical operators in QGIS documentation through the [following link](https://docs.qgis.org/3.28/en/docs/user_manual/working_with_vector/attribute_table.html#selecting-features).
